title: The Marines Face the Chaos
description: Pages 11–15 focus on the marines face the chaos, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, Zoro, Unknown person #3 as the former toys and underground prisoners rise into the city, while Doflamingo's officers and the Marines struggle to control the chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We picked a nasty place to fall into!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, straw hat. Once I get out of these restrants, I'm going to kill you first of all!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I should probably point out that almost anywhere would be a "nasty place".

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: After all, this whole country is our enemy now!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Straw hat, not this way either!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Two three- Star targets, and one two- star!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: A weird guy came swimming through the ground!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Run for it!! He's a "super- weight man"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: fire!!! They're worth two or three stars each!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Should I actually slice them, though?! Some of them are just civilians!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: I think that's eno- ugh reckless shooting...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: A rain of bullets will do no good here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: that five-star usopp is here in the Colos- Seum!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Thanks to the moving terrain, the outer wall of the colosseum is now connected to the King's Plateau!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: If we climb up there, we can meet up with the others!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Hurry it up, hurry it up!! I won't let the enemy come after ya!! Don't you folks worry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: Curses... SABO has wandered off somewhere again...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: What is he planning this time....?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: I knew it was no use... we can't fight them...!

summary: The Marines Face the Chaos develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Dressrosa Citizens, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
